title: Medieval Jester
description: Adds new Weapons as well as a custom one, also adds new Armor and Tools.
body: This Mod adds a new tool and armor set called blazium, the blazium block can be used to power the beacon and the ingot can be used to apply the effect to the beacon. My mod also adds a few new tools including, a Battle Axe, a TNT Staff, and a few masks that you can wear around for fun, there are a few variants of masks including, the regular mask, a Donkey mask, a Zombified Piglin mask, a Wolf mask, and a Fox mask.
